description: Editorial automotive promo section with left-aligned image, centered content panel, four service highlights, and a single outlined CTA.
goals: Keep the copy premium, concise, and automotive-focused
Preserve exactly four feature items for balanced two-column layout
Maintain a strong contrast between the image area and the light content panel

fieldGuidance.heading: Use 2-4 words in uppercase title case.
fieldGuidance.description: Use 20-34 words with a premium dealership tone.
fieldGuidance.items[].text: Use 5-12 words and describe one service capability per item.
fieldGuidance.button.label: Use 2-4 words in uppercase.
fieldGuidance.items[].icon: Use a Font Awesome class such as fa-check.
